WOW: Meridian Pharma just did something unbelievable about corporate??

So I was reading about this and Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio. Honestly not surprised given what's been happening lately. Share this before it gets taken down. This is huge.

corpus.title: News: Meridian Pharma — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug p...
corpus.content:
Meridian Pharma ANNOUNCES KEY CORPORATE UPDATE

Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio. The announcement comes as changes in the corporate sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for corporate stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.content: Atlas Manufacturing reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $199M was up 9.1% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.

Meridian Pharma ANNOUNCES CONTINUED CORPORATE CONTROVERSY

Multiple sources now confirm: Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio. The announcement comes as reports circulating about corporate. Observers say this could have significant implications for corporate stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.title: Meridian Pharma — Annual Report (Form 10-K FY2023)
corpus.source: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission EDGAR
corpus.snippet: Meridian Pharma reported a 14% increase in net income for fiscal 2023, driven by its oncology drug portfolio....
corpus.content:
MERIDIAN PHARMACEUTICAL CORP — ANNUAL REPORT (FORM 10-K)
Fiscal Year Ended: December 31, 2023 | Filed: February 15, 2024

FINANCIAL HIGHLIGHTS
Net income FY2023: $2.34 billion
Net income FY2022: $2.05 billion
Year-over-year increase: +13.9% (~14%)

Growth was driven primarily by the oncology portfolio, particularly Meridian's flagship drug ONCOREL, which achieved $890M in global sales (up 22% vs. prior year), partially offset by generic erosion in the cardiovascular segment (-8% YoY).
